date_notes: Strike authorization vote result announced October 1 2025 per notwithstanding analysis. ATA source URL: teachers.ab.ca/News Room/ata news/strike-authorization (ev_015).
title_en: Teachers vote 94.5% to authorize strike action
title_fr: Les enseignants votent à 94,5 % pour autoriser une grève
description_en: Following the 89.5% rejection of the tentative agreement, ATA members vote 94.5% in favour of authorizing strike action — a near-unanimous mandate. The 94.5% authorization is one of the strongest strike mandates in Alberta labour history. The ATA sets a strike date of October 6 2025, giving the government and TEBA five days to return to the table with a materially different offer.

relations.note: Authorization vote leads directly to October 6 strike start.
